title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kia India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kia India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
